articles.title: Gabe Newell, founder of Bellevue’s Valve, buys $70.8M Florida mansion - The Seattle Times
articles.description: The 20,000-square-foot house spans from the ocean to the Intracoastal Waterway, with a private dock and a tunnel leading directly from the house to the ocean shore.

articles.title: Grand Theft Auto VI Cover and Pre-Order Date Revealed in New Viral Video Months Before Release - Bleacher Report
articles.description: Video game fans were given a treat on Thursday morning, as the official cover art for the highly anticipated Grand Theft Auto VI was unveiled.

articles.title: No, Sony Did Not End ‘Destiny 2’ To Get ‘Revenge’ On Bungie - Forbes
articles.description: New reporting says that Sony closed down Destiny 2 as a sort of revenge for Bungie's influence on its live service plans. That is not the case.

articles.title: Is your Pixel running smoother after updating to Android 17? [Poll] - 9to5Google
articles.description: How is the Android 17 performance with your Pixel, and are you experiencing a better device across the board now?

articles.title: This Ghost in the Shell keyboard makes me want to activate the hundred spidery robot fingers inside my regular fingers - The Verge
articles.description: Iqunix’s EV63 Ghost in the Shell Edition mechanical keyboard is an anime fan’s dream: cyberpunk style, speedy gaming performance, and great feel and sound.
